headline: Diverse Portfolio, Investments & Buyouts Aid OMC Amid Stiff Rivalry
summary: Omnicom leverages diversified services, tech investments and acquisitions to fuel growth, but liquidity concerns and intense competition persist.

headline: Trane Technologies Earns Top 20 Ranking Among TIME’s 2026 World’s Most Sustainable Companies
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, June 24, 2026--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, has been named to TIME’s 2026 list of the World’s Most Sustainable Companies, ranking 19th. Published in collaboration with Statista, the annual list highlights global companies that are embedding sustainability into core business strategy and delivering measurable environmental and social impact.
